narrative:
Fremont municipal court district has 16,636 registered voters, with 58.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.5%, a clear Republican lean of 10.3 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -2.9% D−R vs -14.8% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
